metric: Execution accuracy (EX): predicted result set equals the gold query's result set — order-agnostic unless the gold has a top-level ORDER BY; column order ignored; extra predicted columns tolerated.
note: Full pipeline (safety gate included) per example, generator_mode=deterministic. Each question runs against its own database via connection_url.

details.question: How many singers are there?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "concert" LIMIT 10000

details.question: What is the average age of the singers?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   ROUND(AVG("age"), 2) AS avg_age FROM "singer" LIMIT 10000

details.question: How many singers are there from each country?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   "country" AS country,   COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "singer" GROUP BY   "country" ORDER BY   row_count DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 50
details.gold_sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) FROM singer GROUP BY country

details.question: What is the total capacity of all stadiums?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   SUM("capacity") AS sum_capacity FROM "stadium" LIMIT 10000

details.question: What is the maximum ticket price among all concerts?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   "concert_name" AS concert_name,   SUM("ticket_price") AS sum_ticket_price FROM "concert" GROUP BY   "concert_name" ORDER BY   sum_ticket_price DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 50

details.question: How many stadiums are in each city?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   "city" AS city,   COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "stadium" GROUP BY   "city" ORDER BY   row_count DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 50
details.gold_sql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) FROM stadium GROUP BY city

details.question: What are the names of stadiums that have hosted more than one concert?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   "concert_name" AS concert_name,   SUM("ticket_price") AS sum_ticket_price FROM "concert" GROUP BY   "concert_name" ORDER BY   sum_ticket_price DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 50
details.gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM concert AS T1 JOIN stadium AS T2 ON T1.stadium_id = T2.stadium_id GROUP BY T1.stadium_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

details.question: For each singer, how many concerts have they performed in?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   "name" AS name,   COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "singer" GROUP BY   "name" ORDER BY   row_count DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 50
details.gold_sql: SELECT T2.name, COUNT(*) FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.singer_id = T2.singer_id GROUP BY T1.singer_id

details.question: How many customers are there?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "sales_order" LIMIT 10000

details.question: What is the total amount across all orders?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   SUM("amount") AS sum_amount FROM "sales_order" LIMIT 10000

details.question: How many customers are in each segment?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   "segment" AS segment,   COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "customer" GROUP BY   "segment" ORDER BY   row_count DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 50
details.gold_sql: SELECT segment, COUNT(*) FROM customer GROUP BY segment

details.question: What is the average unit price for each product category?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   "product_name" AS product_name,   ROUND(AVG("unit_price"), 2) AS avg_unit_price FROM "product" GROUP BY   "product_name" ORDER BY   avg_unit_price DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 50
details.gold_sql: SELECT category, AVG(unit_price) FROM product GROUP BY category

details.question: What is the total order amount for each customer city?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   SUM("amount") AS sum_amount FROM "sales_order" LIMIT 10000
details.gold_sql: SELECT T2.city, SUM(T1.amount) FROM sales_order AS T1 JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id GROUP BY T2.city

details.question: What is the total revenue for each product category?
details.predicted_sql: SELECT   "product_name" AS product_name,   SUM("unit_price") AS sum_unit_price FROM "product" GROUP BY   "product_name" ORDER BY   sum_unit_price DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 50
details.gold_sql: SELECT T2.category, SUM(T1.amount) FROM sales_order AS T1 JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.product_id = T2.product_id GROUP BY T2.category
